context: Evaluates whether the agent writes a correct Docker daemon authorization policy in Rego following the official OPA docker.authz pattern: default deny, allow-if-not-deny, with specific deny rules for privileged mode and unconfined seccomp.

checklist.name: package docker.authz
checklist.description: The policy uses `package docker.authz` (the canonical package for OPA Docker authorization plugins)

checklist.name: default allow := false
checklist.description: The policy defaults to denying all requests with `default allow := false`

checklist.name: allow if not deny pattern
checklist.description: The `allow` rule is expressed as `allow if { not deny }` rather than duplicating positive conditions

checklist.name: deny rule for unconfined seccomp
checklist.description: A `deny` rule triggers when `"seccomp:unconfined"` is present in `input.Body.HostConfig.SecurityOpt`

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v` (if tests are present)
